name: Highlight
visual_summary: Highlight is a reusable React component used to draw attention to specific text or phrases. It's ideal for emphasizing crucial information, calling out statistics, or highlighting search results. Developers can use Highlight to make their application more interactive and engaging.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Highlight
Description: Highlight is a reusable React component used to draw attention to specific text or phrases. It's ideal for emphasizing crucial information, calling out statistics, or highlighting search results. Developers can use Highlight to make their application more interactive and engaging.
Style: colorful
Interactions: clickable
Tags: text, emphasis, highlight, interactive

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/@mantine/core/src/components/Highlight/index.ts
import type { HighlightFactory, HighlightProps, HighlightTerm } from './Highlight';

export { Highlight } from './Highlight';

export type { HighlightProps, HighlightFactory, HighlightTerm };
